message:
feat(mining): broaden command extraction and add ACIP taint tests

Improve command pattern extraction in CASS session mining:
- Recognize additional command tools: shell, command, terminal, exec
- Support alternative argument key "cmd" alongside "command"
- Makes mining more robust across different AI assistant tool naming

Add comprehensive ACIP (Anthropic Content Injection Protection) tests:
- test_acip_injection_patterns_excluded: verify injection-tainted
  patterns are filtered out completely
- test_acip_sensitive_patterns_labeled: verify sensitive patterns
  receive RequiresReview label for human oversight
- test_acip_clean_patterns_unchanged: verify clean patterns pass
  through without modification

These tests validate the taint propagation system that protects
skill mining from prompt injection attacks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
